segments.text: He's carrying the full advantage—rough being down to one stock against a player like that, right? I mean, they could pull off one of those dirty moves, but ultimately it didn't really matter. Does the drop, takes the stock and...
segments.original_text: llevando a toda la ventaja, que feo estar en situación de último stock con un jugador así, o sea, te puede hacer una de las puercas, aunque finalmente no le importó tanto, le hace el drop, se lleva la planta y pone

full_text: He's carrying the full advantage—rough being down to one stock against a player like that, right? I mean, they could pull off one of those dirty moves, but ultimately it didn't really matter. Does the drop, takes the stock and...
